_comment: ATC response templates organized by airport type (towered/uncontrolled), ATC state, and pilot intent. Each entry defines: response (template text with {variable} placeholders), next_state (state machine transition), and requires_readback (whether the pilot must read back the clearance). The _INVALID key is the fallback when no matching intent is found for the current state. Variables are filled at runtime by atc_state_machine::build_vars() from XPlaneContext data.

fallbacks._comment: Controller fallback lines for garbled / unclear transmissions. Rendered by engine.cpp::build_unclear_response() with the callsign + ', ' prefixed.
fallbacks.garbled_say_again: your transmission was garbled, say again.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, enter {pattern_direction} downwind runway {runway}, report midfield downwind.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, cleared to enter control zone via {entry_vrp}, runway {runway}, report {pattern_direction} downwind.

REQUEST_TAXI.response: {callsign}, {airport} {taxi_controller}, {position_remark}information {atis_letter} current, taxi to holding point runway {runway} via Alpha, QNH {qnh}.

REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING.response: {callsign}, {airport} {taxi_controller}, taxi to general aviation parking via Alpha.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, runway {runway}, cleared for takeoff, wind {wind}, report {pattern_direction} downwind.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, runway {runway}, cleared for takeoff, wind {wind}, on course approved, frequency change approved when airborne.

RADIO_CHECK.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, reading you five by five.

INITIAL_CALL_APPROACH.response: {callsign}, {airport} Approach, radar contact, runway {runway}, QNH {qnh}, report field in sight.

RUNWAY_VACATED.response: {callsign}, roger, contact ground on {ground_frequency}, good day.

RUNWAY_VACATED_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, roger, taxi to general aviation parking via Alpha, good day.

REQUEST_TAXI.response: {callsign}, taxi to holding point runway {runway} via Alpha, QNH {qnh}.

INITIAL_CALL_TOWER.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, runway {runway}, hold short, number one.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared for takeoff, wind {wind}, report {pattern_direction} downwind.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared for takeoff, wind {wind}, on course approved, frequency change approved when airborne.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared touch and go, wind {wind}.

REPORT_POSITION_DOWNWIND.response: {callsign}, number one, runway {runway}, continue approach, report final.
{callsign}, number one, runway {runway}, continue approach, report final.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared touch and go, wind {wind}.

GO_AROUND.response: {callsign}, roger, fly runway heading, climb and maintain pattern altitude, re-enter {pattern_direction} downwind runway {runway}.

REPORT_POSITION_DOWNWIND.response: {callsign}, number one, runway {runway}, continue approach, report final.

REQUEST_TOUCH_AND_GO.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, cleared touch and go, wind {wind}.

RUNWAY_VACATED_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, roger, taxi to general aviation parking via Alpha, good day.

GO_AROUND.response: {callsign}, roger, fly runway heading, re-enter {pattern_direction} downwind runway {runway}.

RUNWAY_VACATED_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, roger, taxi to general aviation parking via Alpha, good day.

REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING.response: {callsign}, runway vacated, taxi to general aviation parking via Alpha, good day.

GO_AROUND.response: {callsign}, roger, fly runway heading, climb and maintain pattern altitude, re-enter {pattern_direction} downwind runway {runway}.

number_to_land_follow._comment: Phase-4 sequencing overlay. Replaces the plain 'cleared to land' response when the user is not the first to land. Variables populated by landing_sequence::compute_landing_sequence().
number_to_land_follow.response: {callsign}, number {seq_number}, follow the {seq_type} on {seq_position}, cleared to land runway {runway}.

continue_approach_traffic_runway._comment: Phase-4 sequencing overlay. Replaces the plain 'cleared to land' response when a stopped/rolling target sits on the active runway centerline.
continue_approach_traffic_runway.response: {callsign}, continue approach, traffic on the runway.

INITIAL_CALL_APPROACH.response: {callsign}, {airport} Approach, radar contact, runway {runway}, QNH {qnh}, report field in sight.

TRAFFIC_DIALOG._comment: Phase-2 traffic dialog. Side-channel parallel to the main ATCState flow — entries here are rendered exclusively by traffic_dialog and atc_state_machine::render_traffic_advisory(). next_state values are unused (traffic_dialog owns its own state); kept for template-engine schema compatibility.

taxi_give_way.response: {callsign}, give way to the {type} approaching from your {side}.

go_around_traffic_runway._comment: Phase-4 unsolicited controller call. Fires when the user is in Pattern/LANDING_CLEARED, within 1 NM of the threshold, and the active runway has a target on it. Render-only: no ATCState change, no traffic_dialog ack expected.
go_around_traffic_runway.response: {callsign}, go around, traffic on the runway, climb runway heading 3000 feet.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, report traffic in sight or negative contact.

INITIAL_CALL_APPROACH.response: {callsign}, {airport} Approach, radar contact, report field in sight.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.response: {callsign}, cleared into {airport} control zone, runway {runway}, QNH {qnh}{tower_handoff_phrase}.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND_VRP.response: {callsign}, cleared to enter control zone via {entry_vrp}, runway {runway}, QNH {qnh}{tower_handoff_phrase}.

INITIAL_CALL_TOWER.response: {callsign}, cleared into {airport} control zone, runway {runway}, QNH {qnh}{tower_handoff_phrase}.

REQUEST_LANDING.response: {callsign}, cleared into {airport} control zone, runway {runway}, QNH {qnh}{tower_handoff_phrase}.

REPORT_POSITION.response: {callsign}, roger, expect pattern entry runway {runway}, contact Tower on {tower_frequency}.

INITIAL_CALL_INBOUND.response: Traffic, {airport}, {callsign} inbound, will report pattern entry.

RADIO_CHECK.response: No response on CTAF. Frequency appears active.
